name: coalface
description: CoalFace — fan-out discipline for swarm work. When a task decomposes into many units, it runs the fan-out as a disciplined factory instead of an ad-hoc swarm: a mandatory scout survey, deterministic partition, workers returning anchor-edit orders as text (propose-not-execute), mechanical QC at collection, single-writer sequential apply behind a pre-swarm snapshot with a domain gate, and a post-run receipt. Wallet invariant: the swarm's DOLLAR cost stays ~solo via cheap worker tiers (raw tokens run HIGHER — fan-out ×N the per-sub baseline), never fewer tokens. Honest frame: it disciplines fan-outs that would happen anyway — it does not make models smarter or guarantee correctness. Cross-agent (any concurrent-subagent platform), zero-dependency, offline, no API keys.
